name: chr20_20p13_subtelomeric_SD
description: 20p13 distal subtelomeric SD field (first ~1 Mb from chr20 p-telomere). Contains DEFB125-126-127-128-129-132 beta-defensin tandem cluster, ZCCHC3, SOX12 and shared subtelomeric duplicons with multiple other subtelomeres.

architecture.internal_structure: DEFB125-132 beta-defensin paralog tandem cluster at 75-95% identity in ~250 kb; subtelomeric duplicons of 5-50 kb at 95-99% identity shared with other subtelomeres; common terminal-cap CNV.
